action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed immediately on scheduler verbose=True (deprecated in recent torch); model.py+train.py truncated (no full MathExprRecognizer, incomplete generate/loop/save); prior exprate~0.0067 with loss~1.2 and partial structure in debug preds (sqrt/frac but symbol errors). Analysis: Core attention+aspect-pad encoder is sound (loss drops, seq_len=64 better than global pool); root error is PyTorch API + incremental truncation from prior edits. Decision: Supply complete non-truncated model.py (add full MathExprRecognizer + fixed generate with EOS stop, no sos/eos in output seqs), complete train.py (remove verbose, add full loop with scheduler.step on exprate, best/last saves, val logging to metrics), keep predict/debug; run full 30-epoch train (timing allows ~15min) + debug + submit_eval for improved baseline.
